home.title: Learn U.S. Stock Quant From Zero
home.description: A bilingual course for beginners, building investing, finance, and U.S. stock foundations before moving into data, quant strategies, backtesting, portfolio construction, and risk control.
home.courseListDescription: The course starts with investing literacy and gradually moves toward a complete quant research workflow.

courses.title: Investing and Finance Basics
courses.summary: Understand saving, investing, compounding, return, risk, asset classes, and investment goals.

lessons.title: Why Investing Matters
lessons.goal: Distinguish saving, investing, and speculation, and understand what investing is meant to solve.

lessons.title: Time Value of Money and Inflation
lessons.goal: Understand why money today and money in the future are not equivalent.

lessons.title: Return, Compounding, and Annualization
lessons.goal: Learn how investment returns are described and why compounding matters.

lessons.title: Risk, Volatility, and Loss
lessons.goal: Build the habit of looking at return and risk together.

lessons.title: Interest Rates, Cash, and Risk-Free Return
lessons.goal: Understand why cash, short-term Treasuries, and risk-free return affect investment comparisons.

lessons.title: Goals, Time Horizon, and Asset Classes
lessons.goal: Connect investment choices with goals, time horizon, and asset classes.

courses.title: How the U.S. Stock Market Works
courses.summary: Learn exchanges, brokers, orders, market hours, liquidity, fees, and regulation.

lessons.title: Who Participates in the Market
lessons.goal: Recognize companies, investors, exchanges, brokers, market makers, and regulators.

lessons.title: Exchanges, Brokers, and Accounts
lessons.goal: Understand how individual investors access the U.S. stock market.

lessons.title: Quotes, Orders, and Fills
lessons.goal: Understand bid, ask, market orders, limit orders, and trade execution basics.

lessons.title: Market Hours, Liquidity, and Costs
lessons.goal: Know that trading is not free and execution quality depends on liquidity.

lessons.title: Regulation, Filings, and Disclosure
lessons.goal: Understand why public information, company announcements, and regulation matter.

courses.title: Stock Basics
courses.summary: Understand ownership, dividends, market cap, sectors, indexes, ETFs, financial statements, and valuation basics.

lessons.title: What a Stock Represents
lessons.goal: Understand that a stock is a share of company ownership.

lessons.title: Common Stock, Preferred Stock, and Dividends
lessons.goal: Recognize common stock types, dividends, and shareholder rights.

lessons.title: Market Cap, Sectors, and Stock Styles
lessons.goal: Understand basic labels such as large cap, small cap, growth, and value.

lessons.title: Indexes, ETFs, and Benchmarks
lessons.goal: Understand how indexes and ETFs work, and prepare for later benchmark comparisons.

lessons.title: Splits, Reports, and Corporate Events
lessons.goal: Know that company events can affect price data and investment analysis.

courses.title: Risk, Return, and Portfolios
courses.summary: Learn returns, volatility, drawdown, correlation, diversification, benchmarks, and rebalancing.

lessons.title: Simple Returns and Log Returns
lessons.goal: Understand common ways to express returns in quant work.

lessons.title: Volatility, Drawdown, and Maximum Drawdown
lessons.goal: Describe risk and loss experience with more concrete metrics.

lessons.title: Correlation and Diversification
lessons.goal: Understand why combining assets can reduce risk.

lessons.title: Benchmark Return and Excess Return
lessons.goal: Learn to compare strategy performance against a relevant reference.

lessons.title: Risk-Adjusted Return
lessons.goal: Understand why lower volatility and drawdown can make the same return more valuable.

lessons.title: Allocation and Rebalancing
lessons.goal: Understand that portfolios are not one-time decisions.

courses.title: Companies, Valuation, and Fundamentals
courses.summary: Understand reports, earnings, growth, valuation, and how fundamental data supports stock research.

lessons.title: The Minimal Map of Financial Statements
lessons.goal: Recognize what the income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement each answer.

lessons.title: Revenue, Earnings, and Margins
lessons.goal: Understand basic measures of a company's ability to make money.

lessons.title: P/E, P/B, and Dividend Yield
lessons.goal: Recognize common valuation metrics and their limitations.

lessons.title: Growth, Quality, and Debt
lessons.goal: Understand why fundamentals can become value, quality, and growth signals.

lessons.title: Expectations, Announcements, and Data Limits
lessons.goal: Know that prices reflect expectations and fundamental data can lag or be revised.

courses.title: Quantitative Investing Mindset
courses.summary: Turn investing ideas into testable hypotheses, rules, signals, parameters, and benchmarks.

lessons.title: From Investing Idea to Research Hypothesis
lessons.goal: Turn a vague idea into a question that can be tested.

lessons.title: Rules, Signals, and Parameters
lessons.goal: Understand that quant strategies are made of repeatable rules.

lessons.title: Alpha, Beta, and Benchmarks
lessons.goal: Know that strategy returns need to be separated from market exposure.

lessons.title: Introduction to Factor Thinking
lessons.goal: Understand why momentum, value, and quality factors are common.

lessons.title: Research Logs and Reproducibility
lessons.goal: Build the habit of recording hypotheses, parameters, and results.

courses.title: Python and Data Basics
courses.summary: Use minimal Python and pandas skills to read, prepare, and inspect financial data.

lessons.title: Research Environment and Notebook
lessons.goal: Set up the smallest usable environment for quant learning.

lessons.title: Minimum Python Syntax
lessons.goal: Learn variables, lists, dictionaries, loops, and functions needed later.

lessons.title: pandas and DataFrame Basics
lessons.goal: Understand filtering, sorting, column calculations, and missing value handling.

lessons.title: Loading CSV and Market Data
lessons.goal: Read simple price data into the research environment and inspect its fields.

lessons.title: Tables and Time Series
lessons.goal: Understand why market data is usually organized by date.

lessons.title: Price, Volume, and Adjusted Prices
lessons.goal: Know the difference between raw prices and adjusted prices.

lessons.title: Trading Calendars, Missing Values, and Corporate Actions
lessons.goal: Understand why financial data is not a normal continuous calendar series.

lessons.title: Charting and Data Checks
lessons.goal: Use simple charts and summary statistics to find data problems.

courses.title: Strategy Signal Basics
courses.summary: Build interpretable signals from momentum, mean reversion, trend, volume, and volatility.

lessons.title: Trend and Moving Averages
lessons.goal: Build a basic trend signal from a price series.

lessons.title: Momentum and Ranking
lessons.goal: Understand how to rank stocks by past performance.

lessons.title: Mean Reversion
lessons.goal: Understand price deviation and reversion assumptions.

lessons.title: Fundamental Signals
lessons.goal: Turn valuation, quality, and growth data into simple signals.

lessons.title: Signal Checks and Interpretability
lessons.goal: Inspect signal distribution, outliers, and economic meaning instead of only looking at results.

lessons.title: From Signal to Strategy Rules
lessons.goal: Define buy, sell, holding period, and rebalancing frequency.

courses.title: Backtesting and Performance Evaluation
courses.summary: Learn the backtesting workflow, costs, slippage, Sharpe Ratio, maximum drawdown, and common biases.

lessons.title: What a Backtest Simulates
lessons.goal: Understand a backtest as a rule check that moves through historical time.

lessons.title: Positions, Cash, and Rebalancing
lessons.goal: Know how signals become position changes.

lessons.title: Costs, Slippage, and Liquidity
lessons.goal: Understand how real trading constraints change backtest results.

lessons.title: Benchmarks and Buy-and-Hold Comparison
lessons.goal: Compare a strategy against simple investable alternatives.

lessons.title: Return, Volatility, Sharpe, and Max Drawdown
lessons.goal: Learn the most basic strategy evaluation metrics.

lessons.title: In-Sample, Out-of-Sample, and Time Splits
lessons.goal: Understand why tuning and evaluation should not rely on the same history.

lessons.title: Look-Ahead Bias, Overfitting, and Parameter Sensitivity
lessons.goal: Recognize common backtesting mistakes and check whether parameters drive results too strongly.

courses.title: Portfolio Construction and Risk Control
courses.summary: Turn signals into positions while managing universes, position sizing, turnover, and portfolio risk.

lessons.title: How to Choose a Universe
lessons.goal: Understand that the stock universe affects strategy results.

lessons.title: Position Sizing and Weights
lessons.goal: Recognize equal weight, signal weight, and simple risk weight.

lessons.title: Portfolio Constraints
lessons.goal: Understand limits such as single-stock caps, sector exposure, and cash ratio.

lessons.title: Turnover and Rebalancing
lessons.goal: Know how rebalancing frequency affects cost and risk.

lessons.title: Risk Rules and Monitoring
lessons.goal: Build portfolio-level risk control awareness.

courses.title: Execution, Paper Trading, and Engineering
courses.summary: Understand order execution, live-vs-backtest gaps, logging, versioning, reproducibility, and paper trading.

lessons.title: Order Lifecycle
lessons.goal: Understand what happens between placing an order and getting a fill.

lessons.title: Backtest, Paper Trading, and Live Trading Gaps
lessons.goal: Know why backtest performance cannot be treated as live performance.

lessons.title: Parameters, Logs, and Configuration
lessons.goal: Make research results reviewable and reproducible.

lessons.title: Pre-Live Checklist
lessons.goal: Clarify that the first version stops at paper trading and risk checks, not direct live trading.

courses.title: Capstone Project
courses.summary: Complete a full research project from hypothesis, data, signals, portfolio, and backtest to a risk report.

lessons.title: Choose a Clear Hypothesis
lessons.goal: Propose a strategy idea that can be tested with data.

lessons.title: Prepare the Dataset
lessons.goal: Read, clean, and inspect the data.

lessons.title: Build Signals and a Portfolio
lessons.goal: Turn the research hypothesis into a runnable strategy.

lessons.title: Backtest, Evaluate, and Revise
lessons.goal: Use metrics and charts to judge strategy performance.

lessons.title: Write the Research Report
lessons.goal: Explain the hypothesis, method, result, risk, and next step.
